stories.headline: Kim Kardashian Supports Ariana Grande at ‘Eternal Sunshine’ Tour Stop in L.A. - TMZ
stories.summary: Kim Kardashian turned a night at Ariana Grande’s "Eternal Sunshine" concert into a viral moment ... showing up to support her ex-boyfriend's ex-fiancée.

stories.headline: Box Office: ‘Disclosure Day’ Launches to $93 Million Globally, ‘Michael’ Nears $950 Million Milestone - Variety
stories.summary: Steven Spielberg's alien conspiracy thriller "Disclosure Day" collected a leading $48.9 million from 73 territories in its international box office debut.

stories.headline: Knicks MVP Jalen Brunson has a message for Swifties after radio analyst dissed Taylor Swift on hot mic - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Fresh off of leading the New York Knicks to their first NBA championship in 53 years, Jalen Brunson is wading into some tense Swiftie discourse.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift's Ex Joe Alwyn Steps Out for Date Night With Sarah Pidgeon Amid Romance Rumors - instyle.com
stories.summary: Taylor Swift's ex Joe Alwyn and 'Love Story' actress Sarah Pidgeon continued to spark dating rumors as they were spotted out in Brooklyn on June 13.

stories.headline: See Bruce Springsteen Perform ‘People Have the Power’ With Bono and Patti Smith - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: Bruce Springsteen, Bono, and Patti Smith came together to sing "People Have the Power" at the Tribeca Film Festival.

stories.headline: "It's a Good Life" for actor Bill Mumy - CBS News
stories.summary: Now 72, the former child star of such classic TV series as "The Twilight Zone" and "Lost in Space" avoided the dangers that other young actors faced while pursuing a Hollywood career, as an Emmy-nomi…

stories.headline: Did ‘Backrooms’ and ‘Obsession’ Really Kick Off a Gen-Z Horror Wave? - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: Two horror movies from two under-30 filmmakers are breaking box-office records. Are we at the beginning of a movement, or the end of it?

stories.headline: Taylor Swift Switches Up Her Signature Style With a Witchy Boho Look for Theater Date Night With Travis Kelce - instyle.com
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and fiancé Travis Kelce enjoyed a date night at 'Oh, Mary!' on Broadway. The singer wore a deep maroon velvet dress with stacked boho necklaces.
